message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array of 3 objects. Each object: question field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback text, and boolean complies.

Given text: "DARBA STRUKTŪRA Dipl... 1.nodaļa iepazīstina ar kredītriska prognozēšanu. (nepabeigts)". It's minimal. So for Chapters: does it list main sections? No, only one section. So fails. Description: does it briefly describe contents? It says 1.nodaļa iepazīstina ar kredītriska prognozēšanu. That's a brief description. But it's only one. But still it describes content of that section. So partially meets? But question: "Does the text briefly describe contents of each section." There is only one section listed, and it does describe it. So yes? But it's minimal. But the requirement is to describe each section. There is only one section. So it does describe. So compliance true? Might be considered insufficient because not all sections. But there is only one. So maybe compliance true. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? Only one section, incomplete. So no. So compliance false.

Thus produce array:

[
 {"question":"Chapters","feedback":"The text lists only a single section (1.nodaļa) and does not enumerate the main sections of the thesis. It fails to provide a full chapter list.","complies":false},
 {"question":"Description","feedback":"The text gives a brief description of the one listed section – it states that 1.nodaļa introduces credit risk forecasting. Since only one section is listed, the description requirement is technically met, but the overall coverage is very limited.","complies":true},
 {"question":"Structure","feedback":"With only a single, unfinished section mentioned, the overall structure of the thesis is unclear and cannot be inferred from this text.","complies":false}
]

Make sure JSON array.
